summary: Iteration 15 — PWA manifest, Authorized-Reseller badge toggle, and chat-widget revealChatInputRow fix all verified. 10/10 pytest cases pass and a Playwright DOM test confirms #chat-input-row becomes visible (display:flex, 238x44.5px) with the 'Type a message…' input present after revealChatInputRow() is called. PHP -l clean on all 6 changed files.
action_items: Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md — the seeded admin password in the freshly-reseeded DB is Admin@UC2026! (the documented default), NOT Admin@123. The doc still lists Admin@123 which fails on the current DB. Either re-run the seed that downgrades to Admin@123 or update the doc.
critical_code_review_comments: Manifest endpoint correctly sets Content-Type: application/manifest+json and no-store cache headers — good.
Authorized-Reseller toggle is consistently wired across header, footer (with copy swap to 'Trusted Software Store • 2+ Years'), and checkout summary — verified.
revealChatInputRow() defensive pattern (inline style + class) works under simulated lead-skipped state; consider also setting aria-hidden=false for screen readers.
Note: test_credentials.md drift vs DB — could cause future agents to skip admin-gated tests.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (chat widget defensive reveal + head meta + badge count all pass)

test_credentials: admin@maventechsoftware.com / Admin@UC2026!  (Admin@123 from test_credentials.md no longer matches DB hash $2y$10$SyFgzuu… — password_verify confirms only Admin@UC2026! succeeds).
seed_data_creation: None. Toggle flipped via MySQL UPDATE settings during OFF-state test and immediately restored to '1'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Suite /app/backend/tests/test_iteration15_pwa_authorized_reseller.py covers PWA manifest, Authorized-Reseller toggle (ON/OFF/restore) and admin company form. It uses ADMIN_PASSWORD env override and falls back to Admin@UC2026!. Toggle is auto-restored to ON in a try/finally. For the chat widget, use the JS-only path (set localStorage.uc_lead_done='1', add 'open' class to #chat-panel, call window.revealChatInputRow()); do NOT submit the lead form. Preview URL: https://indexnow-checker.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this iteration. Only environmental drift: test_credentials.md documents Admin@123 but the reseeded DB row stores a bcrypt hash that only validates against Admin@UC2026!. Adjusted test to use the env-overridable default; flagged for main agent to reconcile.
